description_long: This is a rugged off-road SUV with a compact, open-frame design and large, deeply treaded tires suitable for rough terrain. The vehicle features a roll cage, a spare tire mounted on the roof, and a prominent front bumper for added protection. The body is primarily black with a matte finish, and there is a green rectangular panel on the front, possibly for identification or display purposes. The SUV has exposed suspension components and a minimalistic, utilitarian build, lacking traditional doors and windows. The rear includes a visible tow hook and reinforced bumper, emphasizing its off-road capabilities. The overall design suggests a focus on durability and performance in challenging environments.
description: A compact, open-frame off-road SUV with large treaded tires, a roof-mounted spare, and a rugged black matte finish. Features include a roll cage, exposed suspension, and a green front panel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the green rectangular panel, large tires, and the roll cage structure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spare tire on the roof, exposed suspension, and lack of doors.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the reinforced bumper, tow hook, and the open frame design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the roll cage, large tires, and minimalistic body.
attribute_wheel_design: large, deep-treaded off-road wheels with solid, rugged rims
